description: Create @quant/agent-runtime package with core framework: orchestrator, worker-agent base class, task-decomposer, state-machine, conflict-resolver, approval-queue, audit-trail, undo-engine, trust-score, kill-switch, spending-limit, permissions, and sandbox. This is the foundational agent runtime that all pilot agents and device control will build on.
steps: Create packages/agent-runtime/package.json with name '@quant/agent-runtime', dependencies on @quant/common (workspace:*), @quant/ai (workspace:*), @quant/queue (workspace:*), zod ^3.23.0, and devDependencies for vitest ^2, typescript ~5.5.0, @types/node ^22.0.0. Set type:module, main:src/index.ts, types:src/index.ts, scripts for typecheck and test.
Create packages/agent-runtime/tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.json with composite:true, rootDir:./src, outDir:./dist, references to ../common, ../ai, ../queue.
Create packages/agent-runtime/vitest.config.ts with globals:true.

Create src/permissions.ts - Define 5-level permission model as enum: OBSERVE, SUGGEST, ACT_LOW, ACT_HIGH, FULL_AUTO. Include Zod schema, permission checking functions (canAct, canExecuteHighRisk, isFullAuto), and a PermissionGuard class that validates actions against agent permission level.

Create src/state-machine.ts - AgentState enum: idle, planning, executing, waiting_approval, done, failed. AgentStateMachine class with transition validation (only valid transitions allowed), event emitter pattern for state changes, and getValidTransitions() method.

Create src/audit-trail.ts - AuditEntry interface with: agentId, action, timestamp, result, reversible flag, metadata. AuditTrail class with: log(), getHistory(), getByAgent(), getReversibleActions(), clear(). Use Zod for entry validation.

Create src/undo-engine.ts - UndoEngine class that tracks reversible actions with 5-minute TTL. Methods: registerAction(id, undoFn), undo(actionId), canUndo(actionId), getUndoableActions(). Expired actions are pruned automatically.

Create src/trust-score.ts - TrustScore class: tracks agent trust (0-100 scale). New agents start at 20 (SUGGEST level). Graduation rules: after 30 days of successful actions, can reach FULL_AUTO (score 100). Methods: getScore(), recordSuccess(), recordFailure(), getPermissionLevel(), getDaysActive(). Score maps to permission levels.

Create src/spending-limit.ts - SpendingLimit class with daily/weekly/monthly caps. Methods: recordSpend(amount), canSpend(amount), getRemainingBudget(period), reset(period). Zod schema for config. Throws when cap exceeded.

Create src/kill-switch.ts - KillSwitch singleton class. Methods: activate() halts all registered agents, register(agentId, haltFn), deregister(agentId), isActive(), reset(). Must guarantee <500ms halt (stores halt callbacks, calls all in parallel). Includes voiceActivate() for voice trigger.

Create src/approval-queue.ts - ApprovalQueue class for high-risk actions awaiting user confirmation. Methods: submit(request), approve(requestId), reject(requestId), getPending(), getById(). ApprovalRequest interface with agentId, action description, risk level, timeout.

Create src/conflict-resolver.ts - ConflictResolver class: detects when two agents modify same resource. Methods: acquireLock(resourceId, agentId), releaseLock(resourceId, agentId), isLocked(resourceId), resolveConflict(resourceId, agents). Uses simple lock-based resolution.

Create src/sandbox.ts - AgentSandbox class: wraps agent execution, logs actions but does not execute them when in sandbox mode. Methods: execute(action), getLog(), isInSandbox(), promote(). New/community agents run here first.

Create src/task-decomposer.ts - TaskDecomposer class: takes a complex natural-language task and breaks it into sub-tasks. Uses @quant/ai for inference. Methods: decompose(task) returns SubTask[], prioritize(subtasks). SubTask has id, description, dependencies, estimatedDuration, requiredPermission.

Create src/worker-agent.ts - Abstract WorkerAgent base class. Properties: id, name, icon, defaultPermission, state (AgentStateMachine), trustScore, auditTrail. Abstract method: run(task). Concrete methods: start(), pause(), stop(), getStatus(). Integrates with kill-switch registration on start, deregistration on stop.

Create src/orchestrator.ts - Orchestrator (supervisor agent) class: accepts high-level tasks, uses TaskDecomposer to break them down, dispatches to worker agents in parallel where possible. Methods: executeTask(task), getRunningAgents(), getTaskStatus(taskId). Manages agent lifecycle, handles failures, reports progress.
Create src/index.ts - Barrel exports for all core modules.
Create src/__tests__/permissions.test.ts - Test all 5 permission levels, canAct logic, PermissionGuard validation.
Create src/__tests__/state-machine.test.ts - Test valid/invalid transitions, event emission.
Create src/__tests__/audit-trail.test.ts - Test logging, history retrieval, reversible filtering.
Create src/__tests__/undo-engine.test.ts - Test undo within TTL, expiry after 5 min, pruning.
Create src/__tests__/trust-score.test.ts - Test initial score=20, graduation logic, permission level mapping.
Create src/__tests__/spending-limit.test.ts - Test daily/weekly/monthly caps, cap enforcement.
Create src/__tests__/kill-switch.test.ts - Test activation halts all agents, <500ms timing with mocked agents.
Create src/__tests__/approval-queue.test.ts - Test submit, approve, reject, pending retrieval.
Create src/__tests__/conflict-resolver.test.ts - Test lock acquisition, conflict detection, resolution.
Create src/__tests__/sandbox.test.ts - Test actions logged but not executed, promote to live.
Create src/__tests__/task-decomposer.test.ts - Test decomposition with mocked AI, prioritization.
Create src/__tests__/worker-agent.test.ts - Test lifecycle (start/pause/stop), state transitions, kill-switch integration.
Create src/__tests__/orchestrator.test.ts - Test task dispatch, parallel execution, failure handling.
acceptance_criteria: All 13 core source files compile with TypeScript strict mode (no any)
All test files pass with NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run
Kill switch test confirms <500ms halt timing
Permission test validates agents cannot act without proper level
Spending limit test confirms agent stops at cap
Trust score test confirms new agent starts at SUGGEST (score 20)
Sandbox test confirms actions logged but not executed
Approval queue test confirms high-risk action blocked until approved
